name: repo-triage
description: Summarize local repository state and branch readiness.

interface.shortDescription: Summarize local repository state and branch readiness.
interface.longDescription: Repo Triage inspects local Git state, dirty worktrees, branch comparisons, changed files, recent commits, upstream tracking, and optional PR or issue context.
defaultPrompt: Use $repo-triage to summarize the current repo state.
